description: Data Shape Signatures for Generative UI Demo. Maps BigQuery result shapes to UI component candidates. Used by the Data Shape Analyzer to guide LLM component selection. Aligns to PRD/Jira requirement: Define Data Shape Signature library (15+ entries).

signatures.example_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_subscribers FROM dim_subscriber WHERE tenure_days > 0;
signatures.notes: Single numeric KPI; render as a labeled stat or card.

signatures.example_query: SELECT AVG(data_gb_used) AS avg_daily_data_gb, COUNT(*) AS total_days, COUNTIF(throttle_flag) AS throttle_days FROM fact_usage_daily;
signatures.notes: Row with multiple numeric metrics; ideal for KPI strip.

signatures.example_query: SELECT date, SUM(data_gb_used) AS total_data_gb FROM fact_usage_daily WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY date ORDER BY date;
signatures.notes: Date + metric; default to line chart.

signatures.example_query: SELECT DATE(event_timestamp) AS event_date, severity, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM fact_network_events WHERE event_timestamp >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) GROUP BY event_date, severity ORDER BY event_date, severity;

SELECT p.tier, SUM(f.data_gb_used) AS total_data_gb FROM fact_usage_daily f JOIN dim_plan p ON f.plan_id = p.plan_id WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY p.tier ORDER BY total_data_gb DESC;

SELECT d.brand, d.model, SUM(f.data_gb_used) AS total_data_gb, COUNT(DISTINCT f.subscriber_id) AS unique_subscribers FROM fact_usage_daily f JOIN dim_subscriber s ON f.subscriber_id = s.subscriber_id JOIN dim_device d ON s.device_id = d.device_id WHERE f.date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY d.brand, d.model ORDER BY total_data_gb DESC LIMIT 10;
signatures.notes: Wide table with mixed types; use table component.

signatures.example_query: SELECT segment, COUNTIF(autopay_enabled) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS autopay_rate_pct FROM dim_subscriber GROUP BY segment ORDER BY autopay_rate_pct DESC;
SELECT DATE_TRUNC(date, WEEK) AS week_start, SUM(data_gb_used) AS weekly_data_gb, COUNT(DISTINCT subscriber_id) AS active_subscribers FROM fact_usage_daily GROUP BY week_start ORDER BY week_start;
SELECT SUM(hotspot_gb_used) AS total_hotspot_gb, AVG(hotspot_gb_used) AS avg_hotspot_gb_per_day FROM fact_usage_daily WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);
signatures.notes: Few rows, two columns; compact summary card.

signatures.example_query: SELECT COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fact_usage_daily) AS event_rate_pct FROM fact_network_events WHERE DATE(event_timestamp) >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);
signatures.notes: Single percentage KPI; render as alert or card.

signatures.example_query: SELECT date, COUNTIF(refill_flag) AS refill_events, COUNT(DISTINCT subscriber_id) AS unique_subscribers FROM fact_usage_daily WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY date ORDER BY date;

SELECT s.segment, d.brand, COUNT(*) AS subscriber_count, COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY s.segment) AS segment_pct FROM dim_subscriber s JOIN dim_device d ON s.device_id = d.device_id GROUP BY s.segment, d.brand ORDER BY s.segment, segment_pct DESC;
signatures.notes: Two categories + count + pct; nested/expandable table.

signatures.example_query: SELECT zip, SUM(data_gb_used) AS total_data_gb, COUNT(DISTINCT subscriber_id) AS unique_subscribers FROM fact_usage_daily f JOIN dim_subscriber s ON f.subscriber_id = s.subscriber_id WHERE f.date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY zip ORDER BY total_data_gb DESC LIMIT 5;
signatures.notes: ZIP + metric + distinct count; ranked bar chart or table.
Single text value; render as text card or inline.

signatures.example_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_subscribers, AVG(tenure_days) AS avg_tenure, COUNTIF(autopay_enabled) AS autopay_count, COUNTIF(autopay_enabled) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS autopay_pct FROM dim_subscriber;
signatures.notes: Row with many metrics; KPI strip or metric grid.
